text.title: Figma Comment Triage Protocol Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Figma Comment Triage Protocol end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, and output.

step.name: pull-open-comments
step.action: Fetch all open comments via API or sidebar export.

step.name: classify-each
step.action: Apply FIX / DECIDE / ANSWER / IGNORE taxonomy.

step.name: assign-owner-per-row
step.action: Set a named owner per row; never 'team'.

step.name: route-decides
step.action: Create or link a log row for each DECIDE.

step.name: resolve-fixed
step.action: Link each FIX row to a ticket or commit before resolving.

step.name: emit-sweep-artefact
step.action: Run validator; commit JSON to the sweep store.
